headline: Alejandro Garnacho
body: 🚨🟣🔵 More on Alejandro Garnacho and Aston Villa story revealed earlier today. Garnacho aware of Unai Emery’s desire to work together + AVFC manager approved Alejandro as top target, as reported. Negotiations underway with Chelsea to get the deal done.
raw_text:
🚨🟣🔵 More on Alejandro Garnacho and Aston Villa story revealed earlier today.

Garnacho aware of Unai Emery’s desire to work together + #AVFC manager approved Alejandro as top target, as reported.

Negotiations underway with Chelsea to get the deal done.
